title: Oru Kadhal Kalavani Lyrics Thodra
stanzas:
oru kadhal kalavaani
usura thirudi ponane
poi pesum kannaala
manasa maraichu vachaane

avan moochu kaaththaaga
maara venum aathaadi.
thannaala porene
avan kooda pinnaadi.

pollaatha kadhal vandhu
kollaama ena kolluthe.
sollaatha vetkam vandhu
ullukulle thaakkuthe.

oru kadhal kalavaani
usura thirudi ponane

manakkolam konda penne
maalai soodi
manamedai vandha kanne

maangalyam thanthunaane
kannaalanum malar maalai
soodinaane

kaathirundha kazhugaai thaane
unnai thaedi paarkiren
kandathum paambai pola
pathungi kolgiren.

kaalai enthan kanavil thaane
unnai thinam kaangiren
konji konji pesinaalum
kuzhandhai aagiren

poothu poothu naan ingae
solaiyaaga maarinene
unnai kaanavillai endraal
paalayaagiren

unnai serndhidave
ingu naan pirandhen.
ini vazhndhidave angu
naan varuven.

neeye vandhu nillu
neethaan venunnu sollu.

oru kadhal kalavaani
usura thirudi ponane
poi pesum kannaala
manasa maraichu vachaane

avan moochu kaaththaaga
maara venum aathaadi.
thannaala porene
avan kooda pinnaadi.

pollaatha kadhal vandhu
kollaama ena kolluthe.
sollaatha vetkam vandhu
ullukulle thaakkuthe.

seo.title: Oru Kadhal Kalavani Lyrics Thodra

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Oru Kadhal Kalavani explores themes of love and heartbreak, expressing the pain of separation and longing.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Thodara, highlighting the emotional turmoil of the characters involved.

Who is the singer and lyricist of the song?

The song is sung by Chinmayi and the lyrics are penned by SBI Mohan.

When was the song released?

Oru Kadhal Kalavani was released on March 14, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Kadhal Kalavani, the protagonist reflects on the bittersweet nature of love, expressing feelings of longing and heartache. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an emotional atmosphere that resonates with anyone who has experienced love's complexities. It serves as a poignant reminder of the joys and sorrows intertwined in romantic relationships. As part of Thodara, this track beautifully encapsulates the essence of the film's narrative.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Kadhal Kalavani from Thodara is a beautifully crafted romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by the talented Chinmayi, this song weaves a tale of heartache and desire that resonates deeply with listeners. The poignant lyrics by SBI Mohan add a unique depth, making it a must-listen for anyone who appreciates heartfelt music.
stanzaMeanings: A love thief has come and stolen my heart, speaking lies and hiding my feelings.
He needs to change his attitude. I will go away from him, leaving him behind.
A love that is not true cannot take me away. The unspoken sadness is troubling my heart.
A love thief has come and stolen my heart.
A girl who has captured my heart, with a garland around her neck, has come to my mind.
The auspicious thread has been given, and she has adorned herself with a flower garland.
I am searching for you like a bird that has been waiting, and I am watching you like a snake.
In my dreams, I see you every day. Even when I speak softly, I become like a child.
I have changed here to be a garden for you. If I can't see you, I will become a ruin.
I was born here to be with you. From now on, I will live here and return.
You come and stand here, tell me that you want me.
A love thief has come and stolen my heart, speaking lies and hiding my feelings.
He needs to change his attitude. I will go away from him, leaving him behind.
A love that is not true cannot take me away. The unspoken sadness is troubling my heart.
